title: C1: Frontmatter schema additions (relevance_scope + relevance_paths)
description: Add two new frontmatter fields: `relevance_scope: 'narrow' | 'broad'` and `relevance_paths: string[]`. agents.meta node schema mirrors. knowledge-meta-builder.ts (post-rename) frontmatter parser recognizes both fields. Default when absent = `broad` + `[]` (graceful for existing 16 entries). Reuse existing hand-rolled YAML-like parser at (post-rename) line ~709-792; relevance_paths is flow-style array supported by extractInlineArray. Anchor: rc5-rc6-handoff.json#acceptance_criteria for C1; exploration-codebase.json#patterns hand-rolled parser caveat.

files.change: Add scalar parse for relevance_scope (default broad); add flow-array parse for relevance_paths (default [])
Mirror new fields in description_index entry contract

implementation: Read knowledge-meta-builder.ts extractDescriptionFromFrontmatter to confirm parser surface
Add flow-array parse: match `^relevance_paths:\s*\[(.*?)\]\s*$` via existing extractInlineArray helper
Default values: if field absent → scope='broad', paths=[]
Update agentsMetaNodeBaseSchema: add the two fields with defaults
Add unit tests: parse frontmatter with/without each field, assert defaults
Verify existing 16 canonical entries still parse correctly with defaults applied

reference.examples: Mirror existing tech_stack and entities flow-array parsing in extractInlineArray

criteria: Frontmatter parser recognizes relevance_scope and relevance_paths fields; defaults to broad + [] when absent
agentsMetaNodeBaseSchema includes both fields with proper defaults
Existing 16 entries parse successfully with default values applied (zero parse errors)
Unit tests cover: explicit narrow + paths, explicit broad + [], absent both fields, malformed values

rationale.chosen_approach: Extend hand-rolled parser (no jump to gray-matter); fields are flat scalar + flow-array which existing parser handles
alternatives_considered: Use external sidecar JSON for new fields
decision_factors: Existing parser supports flat scalars + flow arrays per exploration#patterns
rationale.tradeoffs: Future nested fields would still need parser upgrade; deferred to rc.7+ if needed

manual_checks: Lint .fabric/knowledge/ existing entries — all default to broad+[]
success_metrics: Zero parse errors on existing knowledge corpus

risks.description: Some knowledge entries have malformed YAML that previously parsed loosely
risks.mitigation: Defaults are forgiving (broad + []) so even parse-miss is safe

interfaces.name: KnowledgeFrontmatterRelevance
interfaces.purpose: New fields appended to frontmatter description
